case_title: STEINBERG, MICHELLE MS. et al VS FEALY, PETER MR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FEALY, PETER MR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEINBERG, MICHELLE MS. SOKOL, TODD MR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEALY, PETER MR. $652.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $691.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
